description_long: This muffin features a dark, almost black wrapper with a rough, woodgrain-like texture, giving it a rustic and artisanal appearance. The muffin top is bulbous and rises above the wrapper, with a pronounced, irregular swirl or peak at the center, resembling a twisted stem. The surface of the muffin top is covered in a white, streaky pattern that mimics the look of wood grain, and several round, lighter-colored spots are visible, possibly representing nuts or decorative inserts. The overall shape is slightly asymmetrical, with the top leaning to one side and the wrapper forming a wide, flat rim around the base. There is no visible frosting or glaze, and the muffin appears dense and substantial. The object is isolated with no visible background or support, giving it a floating appearance.
description: A rustic muffin with a dark, wood-textured wrapper and a streaky, bulbous top featuring a twisted peak and light spots. The muffin has a dense, artisanal look with no visible frosting.
description_view_0: The muffin's twisted peak is visible, with a prominent light spot on the upper front and the wide, dark wrapper rim clearly shown.
description_view_1: The twisted peak is more upright, and a single light spot is centered on the muffin top, with vertical streaks dominating the surface.
description_view_2: The peak leans slightly, and a light spot is visible on the right side of the muffin top, with the wrapper's rim appearing even and circular.
description_view_3: The peak is most vertical, and a light spot is positioned on the lower right of the muffin top, with the woodgrain texture most pronounced.
